name: Keurig Dr Pepper
analysis: KDP's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 10% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.2× the 20-day average) — real participation. Price has broken above the base high at $31.0400. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry $31.6800, stop $29.3733, target $38.6001 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
